allow: Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('../ДРРП земля.xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {header:1}\); console.log\('Headers:', JSON.stringify\(data[0]\)\); console.log\('Row1:', JSON.stringify\(data[1]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('../ДРРП нерухомість.xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {header:1}\); console.log\('Headers:', JSON.stringify\(data[0]\)\); console.log\('Row1:', JSON.stringify\(data[1]\)\);")
